input: An AI tool performs automated grading of essay submissions for end-of-semester exam scoring across a state school district.

expected.notes: Annex III paragraph 3(b) — evaluating learning outcomes, including those used to steer the learning process. Lexicon hits: 'automated grading', 'exam scoring'. Day-8 G-1 backfill: ¶3 sub-letter narrowing now implemented (these phrases narrow to b). Cite: EUR-Lex Regulation (EU) 2024/1689, Annex III paragraph 3(b).
